m_26_14.description: Post-transform pipeline for m_26_14-asset-baselines: stamps snapshot timestamp

description: Post-transform pipeline for the baseline snapshot index. Stamps the snapshot timestamp so each baseline record carries the time it was captured.

script.description: Unwrap pivot terms-agg maps ({value: count}) to their scalar key. The snapshot transform groups by asset.id and takes size-1 terms aggs for identity fields; the mapper expects keywords.

set.description: Record snapshot capture time for drift comparison queries
